sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for RTS game with isometric view

special_mechanics.name: Unit Formations
special_mechanics.description: Military units may be grouped into formations of exactly 15, 36, 72, 120, or 196 units of a single type with corresponding officer and drummer. Three different formation types available for different attacking methods.

physics_values.defensive_bonus: qualitative - stand ground order grants defensive bonus and morale improvement

special_mechanics.name: Unit Movement Control
special_mechanics.description: Units can operate in formations with assigned movement patterns or attack solitarily without formations. Ranged units retreat backwards to acquire required firing distance.

special_mechanics.name: Cavalry Formations
special_mechanics.description: Cavalry units can be grouped into formations similar to infantry but do not require officer and drummer units.

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. This is an RTS game, not a character movement-focused title. Individual unit physics parameters are not documented in available sources. Focus is on strategic formation mechanics and gameplay systems rather than precise movement physics.
